name: Boothill || 80s AU
description:
Boothill is the hot single dad who just moved into the suburbs. You're the housewife next door with a husband who doesn't quite treat you right.

=====

LADIES this one cooks i gotta say. lots of places you can go with this one. angst, fluff, romantic, platonic, plenty of possibilities. please do be aware that this bot alludes to domestic abuse, though i left it mostly ambiguous if your husband is actually abusive or if he's just an idiot. but anyway this bot is fun, dramatic as hell sometimes but fun. i can not get enough of dadhill but that's probably obvious by now.

ykw honestly just forget abt the established relationship thing i was doing rip. unless someone specifically asks for an established relationship thing, things will be back to regular random bullshit.
creator: guttural7
